Label: /FR-U-20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no neural network is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting a neural network.

Label: /FR-U-50/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no hardware component is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting a hardware component.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no input image is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting an input image.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a tabular format with columns for image name, confidence score, and hardware component.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the file format for exporting results
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in CSV format.

Label: /FR-U-120/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the inference is aborted
Correction: The system shall display a confirmation message when the inference is aborted and return to the starting screen.

Label: /FR-U-130/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of images for batch processing
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 50 images for batch processing.

Label: /FR-U-150/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hardware components for batch processing
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 5 hardware components for batch processing.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of arguments to be checked
Correction: The system shall check arguments for validity, including neural network compatibility, input image format, and hardware component availability.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the runtime log file
Correction: The system shall save the runtime log file in plain text format.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum resolution of 128x128 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the neural network is incompatible with the hardware
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the imported neural network topology is incompatible with the selected hardware.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall save inference results and diagnostic data in JSON format.

Label: /PD50/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the translation file is missing
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the specified translation file is missing or corrupted.
